title: BEM-723 watchdog tick
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 12:57 (UTC+3)'
state_path=Path('governance/state/claude_mailbox_minute_watchdog_state.json')
try:
    watchdog=json.loads(state_path.read_text(errors='ignore')) if state_path.exists() else {}
except:
    watchdog={}
check_count=watchdog.get('check_count',0)
status='watchdog_tick_seen' if check_count and check_count>0 else 'watchdog_tick_not_seen_yet'
blocker=None if status=='watchdog_tick_seen' else {'code':'MINUTE_WATCHDOG_TICK_NOT_SEEN_YET','message':'Workflow may still be queued/running, or push trigger did not fire. Need continue verification or dispatch/repair.'}
state={'schema_version':'verify_minute_watchdog_first_tick.v1','bem':'BEM-723','status':status,'watchdog_state_exists':state_path.exists(),'check_count':check_count,'watchdog_status':watchdog.get('status'),'last_checked_at':watchdog.get('checked_at'),'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem723_verify_minute_watchdog_first_tick.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem723_verify_minute_watchdog_first_tick.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-723 | Verify Minute Watchdog First Tick | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'State exists: '+str(state_path.exists())+sep+'Check count: '+str(check_count)+sep+'Watchdog status: '+str(watchdog.get('status'))+sep+sep+'Blocker: '+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False))+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem723_verify_minute_watchdog_first_tick','status':status,'check_count':check_count,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem723_verify_minute_watchdog_first_tick.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-723 '+status+' check_count='+str(check_count)+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Checked whether minute watchdog workflow produced its first persisted tick state')
"""
No issue comments.
